fields.name: Employee Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to employees.

fields.name: Base Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base unit of measure, such as hour or day.

fields.name: Automatically Create Resource
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a resource card is automatically created for an employee that is added to a project, service, or assembly activity.

fields.name: Allow Multiple Posting Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies if multiple posting groups can be used for the same employee in a general journal or payment document.

fields.name: Check Multiple Posting Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies implementation method of checking which posting groups can be used for the employee.
